narrative:
Hartland Township has 673 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
